svg.content:
<mxfile host="app.diagrams.net" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Página-1" id="X28mdngVA8lAqzwvSgEw"> <mxGraphModel dx="1373" dy="771" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="827" pageHeight="1169" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <UserObject label="" mermaidData="{
 "data": "sequenceDiagram
 participant Repo as EloquentMovimientoRepository
 participant EB as EventBus
 participant FH as MovimientoCreatedFinancialImpactEventHandler
 participant CR as EloquentCuentaRepository
 participant CA as Cuenta (Aggregate)

 Repo->>EB: publishMany([MovimientoCreated])
 EB->>FH: __invoke(MovimientoCreated)
 FH->>CR: findById(cuenta_id) → Cuenta::reconstitute(...)
 FH->>FH: transactionValidatorResolver.resolve(cuenta, movimiento)
 FH->>FH: applyTransactionEffectResolver.resolve(movimiento, cuenta)
 Note over FH: Cuenta.updateSaldoActual(nuevoSaldo)
 FH->>CR: update(cuenta)",
 "config": null
}" id="pB4ZA4TPFgdIxI19Wx7O-1"> <mxCell connectable="0" parent="1" style="group;transparentBounds=1;editIcon=1;lockedGroup=0;groupPadding=20;" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="852" width="1550"
